overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit urban environment. The camera follows a character through an open plaza before proceeding along a fenced street and entering an underpass with dramatic lighting shifts.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with digital billboard

events.description: camera turns left onto sidewalk alongside fenced street

agents.ego_description: walking through the wet plaza toward the street intersection

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of camera then moving right and exiting frame

entered.detail: large illuminated screen with cartoon character mounted on metal framework
tall cylindrical structure with multiple stacked colorful advertisements
red and white painted stripes on wet reflective asphalt
tall pole casting warm orange light onto the pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, with a large digital billboard glowing on the left and a tall neon advertising tower visible on the right. The camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead, who then moves to the right and exits the frame as the camera turns left onto a sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced urban sidewalk alongside multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the metal fence, approaching the overpass

entered.detail: tall industrial metal barrier running parallel to the sidewalk
elevated concrete road structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a fenced sidewalk with a corrugated metal barrier on the left. The warm orange streetlights illuminate the wet pavement while the vertical neon tower remains visible on the right. In the distance, a highway overpass looms ahead as the camera approaches.

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from warm orange to cool white-blue as entering underpass

agents.ego_description: walking into the underpass where lighting becomes cooler and more diffused

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge deck and support pillars overhead
street lamps with white-blue light temperature illuminating the underpass
dark opening leading to covered roadway section

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the underpass beneath the highway overpass, where the lighting dramatically shifts from warm orange to cool white-blue. The concrete structure spans overhead while the tunnel entrance ahead leads into darker covered space. The vertical neon tower fades into the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban plaza that transitions into a sheltered concrete underpass. It begins in a wide nighttime square dominated by a glowing digital billboard and a tall advertising tower, following a pedestrian who eventually exits the frame as the camera turns left onto a sidewalk. As the camera proceeds, the environment narrows into a fenced walkway with a corrugated metal barrier, where warm orange streetlights reflect off the wet pavement. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches and enters a highway overpass, causing the lighting to transform dramatically from warm orange to a cool white-blue. Finally, the vertical neon tower fades into the distance as the camera moves deeper into the dark, covered space beneath the concrete structure.
